original_image_tags: black-and-white photograph of three small, mummified humanoid figures with elongated heads and bodies wrapped in white cloth, displayed on a white surface.

elements.description: One mummified, humanoid figure with an elongated head lying on a white surface. Caption reads: '(U) Figure 1: Mexican journalist Jaime Maussan presented the alleged remains of non-human beings to Congress. (Photo credit: Reuters)'
A rectangular stamp containing the text 'Released in Full'.

judge.reason: Description A states there are three mummified figures while Description B states there is only one figure, which is a direct contradiction on object count.
